target_packages.name: straylight-base
target_packages.purpose: Shared filesystem layout, install-safe defaults, base policy, and common runtime data.

target_packages.name: straylight-firstboot
target_packages.purpose: Hardware discovery, driver activation, first-run checks, and installer handoff.

target_packages.name: straylight-core
target_packages.purpose: Core daemons and non-graphical control-plane services.

target_packages.name: straylight-observe
target_packages.purpose: Health, telemetry, status, diagnostics, and report commands.

target_packages.name: straylight-ops
target_packages.purpose: Backup, migration, remote control, scheduling, and administrative tools.

target_packages.name: straylight-hardware
target_packages.purpose: Kernel modules, accelerator helpers, firmware policy, and hardware-specific integration.

target_packages.name: straylight-ml
target_packages.purpose: ML, prediction, vector, and model-management runtime pieces.

target_packages.name: straylight-ui
target_packages.purpose: Desktop app GUIs, first-run GUI tools, themes, icons, and integration with the distro desktop/window manager.

target_packages.name: straylight-exotic
target_packages.purpose: Experimental and uncommon subsystems outside the default install.

target_packages.name: straylight-all
target_packages.purpose: Meta package for a complete workstation image.
